name: stencil
description: Browser-based image annotation / drawing tool built with native ES modules and vanilla JS.

scripts.build-wasm: cd ../core && emcmake cmake -S . -B build-wasm -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && emmake cmake --build build-wasm -j --target stencil_wasm && mkdir -p ../browser/js/wasm && cp build-wasm/stencil_core.js ../browser/js/wasm/stencilCore.js
